items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the outcome of the persona scenario regarding access revocation triggered by an offboarding checklist. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or confirmations that demonstrate whether this scenario was successfully simulated or if it produced a clear, actionable failure report. Without this critical information, it is impossible to determine if the requirement is satisfied.
